mapper.sql: id, document_id, knowledge_base, original_name, storage_path, content_type, file_size, file_sha256, status, chunk_count, error_message, uploaded_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at, deleted_at
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_knowledge_documents SET status = #{status}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND knowledge_base = #{knowledgeBase} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_knowledge_documents WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND updated_at < #{before} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
